overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval stone town, transitioning from narrow cobblestone streets through archways to a bright open harbor, then along a waterfront path beside city walls. The scene features historic European architecture, NPC townsfolk and guards, and dynamic lighting changes between enclosed shadows and open sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between stone keep walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow medieval street passing guards and townsfolk

notable_agents.action: guard in red and yellow striped armor standing watch against the wall
peasant in simple clothing walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall gray stone wall of medieval keep with rough texture
red fabric banner with gold lion emblem hanging from stone wall
wet cobblestone street surface reflecting light
simple wooden post fence along the right side

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow enclosed medieval street with high stone walls on either side. Guards in striped armor stand watch while peasants walk about. The cobblestone street is damp and the area is shadowed by the surrounding stone buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone archway passage connecting street to town square

events.description: entering covered stone archway tunnel from the narrow street
exiting dark tunnel into bright sunlight of the open harbor area

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway tunnel toward the bright light at the exit

notable_agents.action: townsfolk walking ahead through the archway toward the light

entered.detail: large stone tunnel archway with brick pattern leading through the building
circular stone planter with red flowers in the town square
medieval half-timbered house with dark wooden beams

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the narrow street into a covered stone archway. Geralt walks through the tunnel-like passage where lighting shifts from shadow to bright sunlight. A flower planter sits in the small square before the tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor promenade with waterfront and distant tower

events.description: emerging from archway into open harbor area with water and sailing ships visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront promenade toward the harbor with the sun bright overhead

notable_agents.action: merchant standing near wooden stall looking at goods
woman in medieval dress walking along the waterfront

entered.detail: calm blue water of the harbor with reflections
medieval sailing vessel with white sails docked in the harbor
tall cylindrical stone tower with red roof in the distance
simple wooden market stall with canvas roof

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the tunnel into a bright open harbor area. The cobblestone promenade runs alongside calm blue water where a sailing ship is docked. A distant stone tower rises against the sky, and wooden market stalls line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path transitioning to narrower trail alongside city walls

events.description: path narrows and curves to follow the stone city walls

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path as it narrows and curves beside the city walls

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the narrowing path

entered.detail: wooden directional signpost with multiple arrows
tall defensive stone wall of the city with crenellations
rocky cliff face rising beside the water

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the water but transitions from cobblestone to dirt as it narrows. A wooden signpost appears near the path, and the massive stone city walls become visible on the right. The harbor water and sailing ship recede into the distance as the path curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow secluded path between timber houses and stone city walls with canal

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow secluded path between the city wall and wooden houses, away from the crowds

segments.scene_description: The scene becomes more secluded as the path narrows between timber-framed houses on the left and the massive stone city wall on the right. A canal of water runs alongside the wall. The area is quieter with fewer people, and the lighting becomes more shadowed as the walls block the direct sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed, enclosed medieval street into a bright and expansive coastal harbor. It begins by trailing Geralt through a narrow cobblestone alley flanked by high stone walls, where guards in striped armor and peasants move through the damp shadows. As the path progresses, the camera follows him past a flower planter and through a covered stone archway, where the lighting shifts abruptly from dimness to brilliant sunlight. The scene then opens wide as he emerges from the tunnel onto a sunlit promenade beside calm blue water. Finally, the view expands to reveal a docked sailing ship, wooden market stalls, and a distant stone tower rising against the clear sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a waterfront path that transitions from an open harbor view into a secluded, shadowed corridor. It begins on a cobblestone walkway that gradually shifts to dirt as the path narrows, passing a wooden signpost while the massive stone city walls emerge on the right. As the path curves, the harbor water and distant sailing ships recede from view, drawing the camera deeper into the town. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed space, squeezed between timber-framed houses on the left and the towering city wall on the right. Finally, the environment becomes quieter and more shadowed as a narrow canal runs alongside the wall, blocking the direct sunlight.
